title: eval pack
description: An eval pack: a typed bundle of cases run against a target. The pack shape is the load-bearing contract; the runner and gate both consume it.

target_repo.description: The repo this pack evaluates. Optional in v0.1.

target_shape.description: The shape of the target. Drives which template a pack was generated from.

baseline_run_ref.description: Optional pointer to a baseline run report this pack gates against.

cases.description: The cases. Each is one deterministic check against a fixture trace.

id.description: Stable case id, used in the report.

type.description: The check type. Each maps to a deterministic grader.

input.description: The fixture key this case feeds to the target. The fixture target resolves it deterministically.

expect.description: Expected behavior, interpreted by the grader for this case type.

threshold.description: Minimum score (0..1) for this case to pass.
